import locale
import datetime

locale.setlocale(locale.LC_ALL, "")
_TZ = datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30))


def format_currency(amount: float) -> str:
    return locale.currency(amount, grouping=True)


def format_datetime(dt: datetime.datetime) -> str:
    local_dt = dt.astimezone(_TZ)
    return local_dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")


def get_current_tz() -> datetime.timezone:
    return _TZ


def process_order(order: dict) -> dict:
    price = format_currency(order["amount"])
    created = format_datetime(order["created_at"])
    return {"price": price, "created": created}
